title: Petition: fix the potholes on Rednal Road – Laurence Turner - working hard for Northfield
h1: Petition: fix the potholes on Rednal Road
text_excerpt: Petition: fix the potholes on Rednal Road – Laurence Turner - working hard for Northfield LAURENCE TURNER Home Latest news and views Contact and support Check if you are a constituent How to get in touch See what I can help with Office standards About me Get updates Donate Petition: fix the potholes on Rednal Road Public services Author Laurence Published February 17, 2026 Sign our petition to fix Rednal Road. If you are not redirected, click here . The potholes on Rednal Road are a menace. Please sign this petition, organised by Carmel Corrigan (Councillor for Kings Norton North) and Laurence Turner (MP for Birmingham Northfield), which will be presented to Birmingham City Council for action. Promoted by and on behalf of Laurence Turner of Terry Duffy House, 1 Thomas Street, B70 6NT Privacy policy Acceptable use policy Cookie Preferences This website was built at no cost to taxpayers with Quarto
